action.reasoning: Observation: model.py TypeError: iteration over a 0-d tensor for logit_scale. Train.py also truncated/still has import issues. Analysis: Need to fix model.py (freeze logit_scale properly) and write complete train.py with full training loop, class weights, label smoothing, warmup, CosineLR, gradient clipping, AMP optional, logging, saving best checkpoint. Decision: Overwrite model.py and train.py with corrected, full implementations; then run 5 epochs on full data with class weights (balanced, capped), label smoothing 0.1, lr=5e-5, warmup 1 epoch, dropout 0.1, no AMP (safe). Submit eval with best.pt to get stronger baseline and time measurement (~2.9h, leaving ~4h for improvements).
